title: Customer
description: A customer account in Fastly that owns services and manages users.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the customer.

name.description: The name of the customer account.

owner_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the account owner.

pricing_plan.description: The pricing plan associated with the customer.

can_configure_wordpress.description: Whether the customer can configure WordPress.

legal_contact_id.description: The ID of the legal contact for the account.

technical_contact_id.description: The ID of the technical contact for the account.

security_contact_id.description: The ID of the security contact for the account.

created_at.description: The date and time the customer was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the customer was last updated.
